title: Implement provider-backed HAL power readings
description: Why this exists: t2hn.6.1 defines the board-agnostic HAL power snapshot API but intentionally leaves measured battery percent, voltage, charging, and external power unknown until concrete providers are wired. What needs to be done: add provider-backed readings using Zephyr fuel_gauge/charger/sensor/ADC APIs where available, preserve validity flags for unsupported readings, and add fake/provider tests. Acceptance criteria: no fabricated telemetry, out-of-range percent is rejected or omitted, native_sim/fake provider tests cover valid and unsupported properties, and physical board validation is tracked separately for real hardware.
